title: Painting
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'painting'?
Do you or did you ever like painting?
Do you think modern artists are good at painting?
What style or period of painting / art do you like?
What do you think of people who are very good at painting?
Do you think painting is an important school subject?
Do you prefer artists from your country or those from others?
What do you think of artists from other continents?
Do you prefer oils, watercolours, sketches or another medium?
What do paintings mean to you?
What kinds of paintings do you have in your house?
Why is painting and art so important to us?
Do you like watching children paint?
Have you ever been emotionally moved because of a painting?
What do you think artists from centuries ago would think of today's artists?
What painting that you did was/is your favourite?
Would you consider investing money in a painting? Do you think art is a good investment?
What do people think about when they look at paintings in galleries?
